arts.ttl: Arsenal vs. Newcastle preview: "Rivalry" renewed in EFL Cup semi-final as Mikel Arteta sent two-goal verdict
arts.sum: Arsenal expert Charles Watts tells Sports Mole that the Gunners' EFL Cup semi-final first leg with Newcastle United has all the ingredients for a red card.

arts.ttl: Man City told Premier League 'cannot relegate' them in charges bombshell as Newcastle United watch on
arts.sum: Speaking on the Overlap Fan debate, Maguire said it's unlikely that City will be expelled from the league, but will most likely face a huge points deduction that would make relegation to the Championship inevitable. Manchester City have been told they cannot be relegated from the Premier League if they are found guilty of breaching the top flight's financial rules.

arts.ttl: Richard Masters 'worried' as he sends investment warning to Newcastle United and clubs
arts.sum: It comes at a time when the Premier League are 'quite close' to bringing in a new financial regulatory system that would replace the current PSR rules, which limit losses to £105m over a rolling three-year period. Although the established order are currently able to spend more, on account of greater revenues, Masters claimed the new regulator could negatively change the 'investment environment' in the top-flight.

arts.ttl: Michael Oliver in Arsenal spotlight once more as Rasmus Hojlund Man Utd moment stuns viewers
arts.sum: Oliver has shown three straight red cards to Arsenal players during his refereeing career, with four more shown for second yellow cards. Oliver has also brandished 108 yellow cards in the direction of Arsenal players - seven more than Everton have received and eight more than Liverpool.

arts.ttl: Lloyd Kelly start, Botman fear, Miley recall - Newcastle United starting XI calls made vs Arsenal - Chronicle Live
arts.sum: United will be without both Bruno Guimaraes and Fabian Schar through suspension, with Sven Botman's fitness also a potential issue after the Dutch defender made his first start for nine months in the 2-1 win over Tottenham on Saturday. My predicted NUFC XI: Dubravka, Trippier, Botman, Burn, Hall, Joelinton, L Miley, Tonali, Gordon, Murphy, Isak.

arts.ttl: In-stadium VAR announcements trialed as Arsenal hosts Newcastle in the English League Cup
arts.sum: In-stadium VAR announcements by referees will be trialed in English soccer for the first time on Tuesday when Arsenal hosts Newcastle in the semifinals of the English League Cup. Under the trialed process, the referee will communicate the final decision directly to the crowd after reviewing an incident on a sideline monitor.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Brighton open talks to steal £25m signing ahead of Arsenal and Chelsea
arts.sum: TBR Football understands that Brighton & Hove Albion are attempting to pip Arsenal and Chelsea to the signing of Brazilian centre-back Vitor Reis. Arsenal and...

arts.ttl: Arsenal star admits they’ve been “hitting the goalposts” but convinced they’re on right track
arts.sum: Arsenal star Gabriel Martinelli has admitted that they’ve been “hitting the goalposts” in recent years, but is confident success is on the way, nonetheless. GE Globo have an interview with the Brazilian forward today after he hit 200 games for Arsenal in the recent draw with Brentford. arts.ttl: Newcastle United have 'game changer' who could be used as emergency No 9
arts.sum: Newcastle United boss Eddie Howe has talked up Joe Willock's role as he prepares to take on his old club Arsenal this evening. Assessing where the midfielder is going into 2025, Howe said: "I think Joe is probably in his best condition that he's been for a long time.

arts.ttl: Arteta a huge fan of €58m star but special effort from Arsenal owners required
arts.sum: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta is reportedly a huge fan of Nico Williams but a deal would be expensive and complicated to get done this January. In fact, the finances involved may even require a special intervention from Arsenal’s owners, according to the latest from The Athletic.
